query:
SELECT f.id, f.fieldKey, f.label, f.fieldType, f.isRequired, f.isActive, f.displayOrder, f.optionsSource, s.name as sectionName
FROM formFields f
JOIN formSections s ON f.sectionId = s.id
WHERE s.name = 'Basic Information'
ORDER BY f.displayOrder;
